title: alaticaulia luziaemariae
side_effects: Alaticaulia luziaemariae can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its toxic alkaloid content. Ingestion of large amounts can lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can result in skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. If not handled correctly, Alaticaulia luziaemariae can also trigger seizures, coma, and even death in severe cases.
